overview: A modern, full-featured Event Booking Platform where users can browse concerts, workshops, and conferences, view detailed event pages with countdown timers, select ticket tiers, and complete a demo checkout with a QR code ticket confirmation.
features: Browse events by category, date, location, and price with on-submit search
Event detail pages with countdown timer, image gallery, reviews/ratings, and social sharing
Ticket tiers (Early Bird, Standard, VIP) with seat availability and pricing breakdown
Demo checkout flow with attendee form validation and QR code booking confirmation
Favorites (heart toggle) stored in session state
Pre-seeded sample events across concerts, workshops, and conferences
Fully responsive design with vibrant OKLCH color palette
